summary: Full e2e test of RIGS.AI PC advisor: 17/17 backend pytest passed including auth, builds CRUD/filters, favorites, chat with all 3 models (claude/gpt/gemini), multi-turn context, sessions auth, and AI recommend JSON build. Frontend e2e: landing neon dark theme renders, signup auto-logs in and redirects to /chat, chat sends to Claude and receives full build reply (~15s), Catalog shows seeded builds, Compare shows diff with green/red highlights, Profile loads. No console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages uses optional_user but does not verify session ownership - any user with session_id can read messages. Minor privacy issue.
seed_builds() deletes and reseeds when count < SEED_BUILDS length; safe but could cause orphan favorites referencing deleted build IDs on restart.
seed_data_creation: Test user created per run; 12 builds auto-seeded by backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover all endpoints. LLM calls take 5-15s; pytest set timeout=90-120s. AI recommend returns parsed JSON Build successfully with all 3 models tested.
